title: Macrowhisper Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Macrowhisper. In configVersion 2, action-level null means inherit defaults and empty string means explicit empty value (for supported string fields), and ESC simulation is controlled by simEsc (true simulates ESC). At defaults level, nullable scalar fields can use null to fall back to built-in Macrowhisper defaults.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation support. Auto detected by Macrowhisper next to binary or in Homebrew's share/macrowhisper folder

configVersion.description: Configuration semantics version. Version 1 is legacy behavior. Version 2 uses explicit empty semantics (null inherits defaults, empty string is explicit) and simEsc-based ESC control.

defaults.description: Global default settings for all actions

watch.description: Path to Superwhisper recordings folder. null or omitted = use the built-in default path.

disableUpdateCheck.description: Disable automatic update checking. null or omitted = use built-in default (false).

muteNotifications.description: Disable system notifications. null or omitted = use built-in default (false).

noUpdates.description: Legacy alias for disableUpdateCheck. Runtime still accepts this key, but new configs should use disableUpdateCheck.

noNoti.description: Legacy alias for muteNotifications. Runtime still accepts this key, but new configs should use muteNotifications.

activeAction.description: Name of the currently active action (fallback when no triggers match). Generated starter configs set this to 'autoPaste'. Empty string or null means no active action.

icon.description: Default icon for actions. Empty string or null means no default icon. Auto-updated configs rewrite null to empty string at the defaults level.

moveTo.description: Default location to move recording folders after processing. Path to destination directory, '.delete' (delete folder), empty string (no default move behavior), or null. Auto-updated configs rewrite null to empty string at the defaults level.

simEsc.description: Simulate ESC key before action execution. null or omitted = use built-in default (true). Legacy key 'noEsc' is still accepted at runtime and inverted.

simKeypress.description: Use keystroke simulation instead of clipboard for text insertion. null or omitted = use built-in default (false).

smartCasing.description: Enable smart first-letter casing normalization for insert actions in reliable input-field contexts. This lowercases in mid-sentence boundaries and uppercases at strong sentence/line starts. null or omitted = use built-in default (true).

smartPunctuation.description: Enable smart punctuation conflict cleanup for insert actions in reliable input-field contexts. This only removes conflicting boundary punctuation and does not add punctuation. null or omitted = use built-in default (true).

smartSpacing.description: Enable smart boundary spacing normalization for insert actions in reliable input-field contexts. null or omitted = use built-in default (true).

actionDelay.description: Default delay in seconds before executing actions. null or omitted = use built-in default (0).

history.description: Number of days to retain recording history (null = keep forever, 0 = keep only latest)

simReturn.description: Automatically press Return/Enter after action execution. This action can be scheduled with --auto-return <true/false> CLI flag. null or omitted = use built-in default (false).

returnDelay.description: Delay in seconds before pressing Return (if simReturn is enabled). null or omitted = use built-in default (0.15).

restoreClipboard.description: Restore original clipboard content after action execution. null or omitted = use built-in default (true).

restoreClipboardDelay.description: Delay in seconds before restoring clipboard at end of action flow. null or omitted = use built-in default (0.3).

scheduledActionTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for auto-return and scheduled actions when no recording session is active (0 = no timeout, 5 = default). null or omitted = use built-in default (5).

scriptAsync.description: Default execution mode for script-like actions (Shortcut/Shell/AppleScript). true launches asynchronously; false waits for completion up to scriptWaitTimeout. null or omitted = use built-in default (true).

scriptWaitTimeout.description: Default timeout in seconds when scriptAsync is false. null or omitted = use built-in default (3).

clipboardStacking.description: Enable clipboard stacking for clipboardContext placeholder. When enabled, multiple clipboard changes during recording are captured and formatted with XML tags (<clipboard_context_1>, <clipboard_context_2>, etc.). When disabled, only the last clipboard change is captured (default behavior). null or omitted = use built-in default (false).

clipboardBuffer.description: Global clipboard buffer window in seconds for the clipboardContext placeholder. Controls the capture of clipboard content before a recording starts. 0 disables the buffer entirely. null or omitted = use built-in default (5).

clipboardIgnore.description: Regex pattern to ignore clipboard content from specific applications. Use '|' for multiple apps (e.g., 'AppName|com.bundle.id'). Matches against app name or bundle ID. Empty string or null means no apps are ignored. Auto-updated configs rewrite null to empty string at the defaults level.

bypassModes.description: Pipe-separated Superwhisper mode names that bypass Macrowhisper processing entirely for matching modeName values in meta.json. Matching is case-insensitive. Empty string or null disables bypass. Auto-updated configs rewrite null to empty string at the defaults level.

muteTriggers.description: Mute all trigger matching (triggerVoice/triggerApps/triggerModes/triggerUrls) globally. When true, trigger evaluation is skipped and Macrowhisper continues with activeAction fallback logic. null or omitted = use built-in default (false).

autoUpdateConfig.description: Automatically update the configuration file on service startup to apply new schema changes and formatting. When false, startup will not write to the config file. This does not affect manual --update-config. null or omitted = use built-in default (true).

redactedLogs.description: Redact sensitive content from logs (dictation result, clipboard context, selected text, app context, trigger payloads, and regex replacement before/after values). Set to false only for deep debugging. null or omitted = use built-in default (true).

nextAction.description: Default action name to execute after a matched action completes. Empty string or null means no chaining. Auto-updated configs rewrite null to empty string at the defaults level.

inserts.description: Text insertion actions with placeholder support (for example {{swResult}}, {{clipboardContext}}, {{appContext}}, {{appVocabulary}}). Manage via CLI: --add-insert <name>, --list-inserts, --remove-action <name>

.*.title: Insert Action
.*.description: Action name - defines a text insertion action

urls.description: URL opening actions for web links and applications. Manage via CLI: --add-url <name>, --list-urls, --remove-action <name>

.*.title: URL Action
.*.description: Action name - defines a URL opening action for web links and applications

shortcuts.description: MacOS Shortcut actions. Manage via CLI: --add-shortcut <name>, --list-shortcuts, --remove-action <name>.

.*.title: macOS Shortcut Action
.*.description: Action name - this property name is the actual macOS Shortcut name to execute

scriptsShell.description: Shell script execution actions. Manage via CLI: --add-shell <name>, --list-shell, --remove-action <name>

.*.title: Shell Script Action
.*.description: Action name - defines a shell command execution action

scriptsAS.description: AppleScript execution action. Manage via CLI: --add-as <name>, --list-as, --remove-action <name>

.*.title: AppleScript Action
.*.description: Action name - defines an AppleScript execution action

icon.description: Custom icon for this action. null or omitted = inherit defaults.icon. Empty string = explicit no icon.

moveTo.description: Where to move the recording folder after processing. null or omitted = inherit defaults.moveTo. Empty string = explicit no move. '.delete' deletes the folder.

simEsc.description: Simulate ESC key for this action. null = use global default, true/false = explicit override. Legacy key 'noEsc' is still accepted at runtime and inverted.

actionDelay.description: Custom delay in seconds before executing this action. null = use global default, number = explicit override.

restoreClipboard.description: Override clipboard restoration setting for this action. null = use global default, true/false = explicit override.

restoreClipboardDelay.description: Override clipboard restore delay for this action (seconds). null = use defaults.restoreClipboardDelay.

nextAction.description: Action name to execute after this action completes. null or omitted = inherit defaults.nextAction. Empty string = explicit no next action.

triggerVoice.description: Voice trigger patterns. Use '!' prefix for exceptions and '|' for multiple triggers. Normal patterns are treated as prefix matches and will be stripped from the start of result/swResult when matched. Wrap in '==' (e.g., '==^google this\.?$==') to enable full regex matching without stripping. Matching is case-insensitive by default; use regex flags (for example '(?-i)') in raw regex to force case-sensitive matching. Empty string, null, or omit means no trigger.

triggerApps.description: Regex pattern for application trigger matching (app name or bundle ID). Use '!' prefix for exceptions and '|' for multiple triggers. Matching is case-insensitive by default; prefix a pattern with '(?-i)' to force case-sensitive matching. null or empty string means no trigger.

triggerModes.description: Regex pattern for Superwhisper mode trigger matching. Use '!' prefix for exceptions and '|' for multiple triggers. Matching is case-insensitive by default; prefix a pattern with '(?-i)' to force case-sensitive matching. null or empty string means no trigger.

triggerUrls.description: Active URL trigger patterns. Use '|' for multiple tokens and '!' prefix for exceptions. Tokens without scheme (for example 'google.com' or 'www.google.com/docs') match by host suffix and include subdomains. Tokens with 'http://' or 'https://' use exact-host matching (scheme ignored). If a token includes path/query, candidate URL must start with that path/query prefix. null, empty string, or omitted means no URL trigger.

triggerLogic.description: Logic for combining multiple triggers. Accepts 'and' or 'or' (case-insensitive). null defaults to 'or'.

action.title: Insert Action Content
action.description: Text to insert with placeholder support (including context placeholders like {{selectedText}}, {{clipboardContext}}, {{appContext}}, {{appVocabulary}}). Use '.autoPaste' for smart paste behavior. Use empty string for empty payload. Use '.none' for no-op template behavior (different from empty string).

simKeypress.description: Use keystroke simulation instead of clipboard for this action. null = use global default, true/false = explicit override.

smartCasing.description: Enable smart first-letter casing normalization for this insert. null = use global default, true/false = explicit override.

smartPunctuation.description: Enable smart punctuation conflict cleanup for this insert. null = use global default, true/false = explicit override.

smartSpacing.description: Enable smart boundary spacing normalization for this insert. null = use global default, true/false = explicit override.

simReturn.description: Automatically press Return after this action. null = use global default, true/false = explicit override.

inputCondition.description: Insert-only conditional option gate. Pipe-separated tokens, optional '!' negation. Allowed tokens: restoreClipboard, restoreClipboardDelay, simEsc, nextAction, moveTo, action, actionDelay. Strict format: case-sensitive, no whitespace. Empty string, null, or omitted disables conditioning.

action.title: URL to Open
action.description: URL with placeholder support (including {{appVocabulary}} and other dynamic placeholders). Empty string skips URL payload. '.none' applies no-op template behavior (different from empty string).

inputCondition.description: Conditional option gate for URL actions. Pipe-separated tokens, optional '!' negation. Allowed tokens: restoreClipboard, restoreClipboardDelay, simEsc, nextAction, moveTo, action, actionDelay. Strict format: case-sensitive, no whitespace. Empty string, null, or omitted disables conditioning.

openWith.description: Specific application or bundle id to open the URL with. Empty string, null, or omit uses system default.

openBackground.description: Open URL in background without focusing the application. true = background; false/null/omitted = foreground.

allOf.description: Shortcut actions use a separate path: the property name is the exact macOS Shortcut name to run.

action.description: Input to pass to the shortcut with placeholder support (including {{appVocabulary}}). Use '.run' to execute the shortcut without input. Empty string skips payload. '.none' applies no-op template behavior (different from empty string).

inputCondition.description: Conditional option gate for shortcut actions. Pipe-separated tokens, optional '!' negation. Allowed tokens: restoreClipboard, restoreClipboardDelay, simEsc, nextAction, moveTo, action, actionDelay, scriptAsync, scriptWaitTimeout. Strict format: case-sensitive, no whitespace. Empty string, null, or omitted disables conditioning.

scriptAsync.description: Override async execution for this shortcut action. null = use defaults.scriptAsync.

scriptWaitTimeout.description: Override timeout in seconds when scriptAsync is false for this shortcut action. null = use defaults.scriptWaitTimeout.

action.title: Shell Command
action.description: Shell command with placeholder support (including {{appVocabulary}}) and proper escaping. Empty string skips payload. '.none' applies no-op template behavior (different from empty string).

inputCondition.description: Conditional option gate for shell actions. Pipe-separated tokens, optional '!' negation. Allowed tokens: restoreClipboard, restoreClipboardDelay, simEsc, nextAction, moveTo, action, actionDelay, scriptAsync, scriptWaitTimeout. Strict format: case-sensitive, no whitespace. Empty string, null, or omitted disables conditioning.

scriptAsync.description: Override async execution for this shell action. null = use defaults.scriptAsync.

scriptWaitTimeout.description: Override timeout in seconds when scriptAsync is false for this shell action. null = use defaults.scriptWaitTimeout.

action.title: AppleScript Code
action.description: AppleScript code with placeholder support (including {{appVocabulary}}) and proper quote escaping. Empty string skips payload. '.none' applies no-op template behavior (different from empty string).
examples: tell application "TextEdit" to make new document with properties {text:"{{json:swResult}}"}
tell application "Keyboard Maestro Engine" to do script "Sample Macro" with parameter "{{swResult}}"

inputCondition.description: Conditional option gate for AppleScript actions. Pipe-separated tokens, optional '!' negation. Allowed tokens: restoreClipboard, restoreClipboardDelay, simEsc, nextAction, moveTo, action, actionDelay, scriptAsync, scriptWaitTimeout. Strict format: case-sensitive, no whitespace. Empty string, null, or omitted disables conditioning.

scriptAsync.description: Override async execution for this AppleScript action. null = use defaults.scriptAsync.

scriptWaitTimeout.description: Override timeout in seconds when scriptAsync is false for this AppleScript action. null = use defaults.scriptWaitTimeout.
